rows.label: qev091205_MSG0001
rows.name: Here's another sample, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yeah, I'm all out of
ideas. What do you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev091205_SEL0011
rows.name:
Wonder aloud if physical
contact is the issue.

rows.label: qev091205_JNK0020
rows.name: Speculate

rows.label: qev091205_SEL0021
rows.name:
Theorize that the material
may be sentient.

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hey, yeah. Every time he
touches it, it vanishes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0004
rows.name:
Maybe it's time we tried
a different approach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, if we can't push it, we
should try to pull instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0006
rows.name: You mean we just pull it out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0007
rows.name: No, I mean pull the trigger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0008
rows.name: Sentient?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0009
rows.name: Oh, come on. That's insane.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0010
rows.name:
That thing can't be alive. How can
it be alive? Right, Fog Christoph?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0011
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0012
rows.name: Hm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0013
rows.name: Here goes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0014
rows.name: Whoa, are you CRAZY?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0015
rows.name: Whoa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0016
rows.name: It crystallized. ...Weird.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0017
rows.name: You didn't know it would do that?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ugh. That's typical
genius behavior for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0019
rows.name:
That was a revelation, huh?
Like when I discovered watermelons
were actually vegetables.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0020
rows.name:
Anyway, it worked.
Mission complete, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091205_MSG0021
rows.name:
Only thing left is to
report back to Walter.[ST:wait ]
